questions.question: Describe the key differences between public, private, and hybrid clouds. Provide an example of each type of cloud. (Maximum marks: 10)
questions.hint: Explain the characteristics of each type of cloud, including security and control

questions.question: What is cloud security, and why is it essential for cloud computing? (Maximum marks: 5)
questions.hint: Define cloud security and explain its importance in cloud computing

questions.question: Explain the concept of scalability in cloud computing and how it relates to the Service Level Agreement (SLA). (Maximum marks: 8)
questions.hint: Describe the benefits of scalability in cloud computing and explain how it is reflected in an SLA
